query:
UPDATE crm_leads SET sellerId = CASE 
  WHEN id % 7 = 0 THEN 1
  WHEN id % 7 = 1 THEN 2
  WHEN id % 7 = 2 THEN 3
  WHEN id % 7 = 3 THEN 4
  WHEN id % 7 = 4 THEN 5
  WHEN id % 7 = 5 THEN 6
  WHEN id % 7 = 6 THEN 7
END
WHERE sellerId = 240001 AND archived = 0;
